gig_title: I will run an automated SEO & security audit of your website
description:
🔧 I will run an automated SEO & security audit of your website

I deliver a branded PDF report with code-quality, security, and SEO fixes using codebase-inspection + secret-scanner + skill-lint + Stirling-PDF.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• $49–$199/mo per site, pure recurring
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($37, 3 days, 1 rev): Setup only, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($149, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 workflows, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($298, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited workflows, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goal (form on order)
2. I build & test the automation
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 31-skill autonomous company.
